reasons: Corrected Doctor runtime requires a private HMS compose stack.
The required private config and database inputs are local-only and are not committed.
The local Podman installation is available, but the required Doctor service images are not currently present.

The corrected D2 CDS archive exists, but it was trained for the non-reduced D2 artifact and should not be reused as runtime-confirmation proof for the reduced artifact without an explicit retraining or no-CDS policy decision.
claimBoundary: Doctor remains artifact-generalized only. No semantic, runtime memory, V2-C, or V2-D claim is made.
